purpose: Reusable Codex workspace adoption profiles. This manifest describes what a consumer workspace may choose to copy; it does not describe any local runtime state.

statuses.core: Recommended for broadly governed Codex workspaces.
statuses.optional: Useful for specific domains or workflows; adopt when the workspace needs it.
statuses.curated: Kept as source material or examples; do not install by default.
statuses.review: Requires a capability review before adoption.
statuses.deprecated: Kept only for migration context; do not adopt.
statuses.archived: Retired and stored outside runtime-loadable paths.

minimal.description: Repository-only adoption: use docs, policies, and templates without copying runtime-loadable skills or agents.
minimal.notes: Use this profile when evaluating or forking the public template.

governed-codex.description: Core governance and planning capabilities for a Codex workspace.
governed-codex.notes: Start here for a reusable governed workspace.

data-bi.description: Analytics engineering, dbt, BI, and dashboard-oriented workspaces.
data-bi.notes: Adopt when the consumer workspace really performs data or BI work.

frontend-artifacts.description: Frontend interface, local artifact, and browser validation workflows.
frontend-artifacts.notes: Curated art-heavy or scaffold-heavy skills remain excluded unless separately reviewed.

full-reviewed.description: All core and optional capabilities that are approved for broad adoption.
full-reviewed.notes: Does not include review, curated, deprecated, or archived capabilities.
